source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for quiet product interfaces with Noto Sans JP guidance for headings, body, labels, dense tables, and dashboard numerals.
layout: Insulated dashboard panels, 8px component radii, feather-quilt spacing, soft borders, clear navigation, readable charts, forms, status states, and table structures.

prompts.label: Transparent eider duck motif source
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only an Eider Duck plumage motif cutout for a design system named Morphous Eider Duck. The subject should be an elegant eider duck inspired by arctic coast plumage: crisp black crown and belly, soft white back and wing panels, subtle sea green nape and cheek glow, and down cream feather softness. Isolated full subject, no text.
Subject: A single detailed eider duck in calm side-profile three-quarter pose, compact rounded body, layered insulating down feathers, black and white plumage blocks, pale down cream highlights, sea green coastal accent on the head and reflected feather edges.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop beak, tail, feet, or wing silhouette.
Lighting/mood: soft arctic coastal light, quiet premium UI reference, warm insulated feather texture, natural but graphic enough for theme extraction.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no water scene, no nest, no eggs, no flock, no cartoon style, no text, no watermark, no decorative background.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Eider Duck" derived from an eider duck plumage motif.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from eider plumage: black crown and belly, clean white wing panels, muted sea green head accent, down cream warmth, arctic coast fog neutrals. This light board is the primary reference for coding a soft insulation UI system.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, crisp large readable labels, premium product design-system overview.
Required visible sections: Morphous Eider Duck, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Charts, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples with Geist and Noto Sans JP guidance.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, top navigation, metric cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, status indicators, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, down-feather texture samples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style design system, soft insulated surfaces, 8px card radius, quilted feather rhythm, calm arctic coast neutrals, restrained sea green focus states, high contrast black/white plumage blocking.
Color direction: down cream background, charcoal black ink, warm white cards, sea green primary/accent, drift gray borders, kelp slate secondary, pale foam highlights.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Eider Duck", no tiny illegible token tables.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode companion design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Eider Duck". It must feel like the same soft insulation system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Preserve eider duck plumage language: charcoal black crown and belly, clean white wing-panel contrast, muted sea green head accent, down cream warmth, arctic coast fog neutrals, soft insulating feather texture. This dark board is the companion reference for coding the theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, crisp large readable labels, premium product design-system overview.
Required visible sections: Morphous Eider Duck, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Charts, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples with Geist and Noto Sans JP guidance.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, top navigation, metric cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, status indicators, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, down-feather texture samples.
Visual details: deep graphite background, off-white text, down cream surfaces in small highlights, sea green primary and focus rings, drift gray borders, black/white plumage blocks, restrained arctic coast contrast, soft raised cards with subtle feather grain.
Constraints: no neon overload, no unrelated saturated colors, no flat pure-black-only background, no generic purple gradients, no illegible text, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Eider Duck", no tiny token tables.
